title: rubus serpens var. spinuliger
intro: Rubus serpens var. spinuliger, also known as the prickly dewberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The medicinal properties of Rubus serpens var. spinuliger can also provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting tissue repair, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
